# Elite Skills

> Elite Skills sells precision-crafted AI instruction sets (skills) for programmers and vibe coders. Each skill is built from 20 years of production engineering experience by Jack McNicol. Skills work with any AI coding tool (Claude, Cursor, Copilot, etc.) and ship as downloadable instruction files.

## Products

There are two purchase options. Neither is a subscription.

- **One-Time Purchase — $29**: All 6 skills, instant download, use with any AI tool, community Discord access. This is a snapshot of the current version.
- **Lifetime Access — $99** (best value): Everything in One-Time, plus all future updates, new skills as they launch, and priority support. Forever.

## Skills included

Six skills ship in every purchase:

1. **Frontend** — React, Vue, Svelte component patterns. Accessibility-first markup. Responsive layouts.
2. **Backend** — API design, database queries, auth flows, server architecture.
3. **Style** — Tailwind mastery, CSS architecture, design system implementation.
4. **Code Review** — Catch bugs, enforce conventions, PR feedback that teaches AI.
5. **App Bootstrap** — Zero to deployed. Scaffolding, CI/CD, infra-as-code.
6. **Feature Enhancer** — Polish rough features: error handling, edge cases, loading states, optimistic updates.

## FAQ

**Q: What are Elite Skills?**
A: Downloadable AI instruction sets that plug into any AI coding tool. They tell the AI *how* to write code — architecture patterns, conventions, edge-case handling — distilled from 20 years of shipping production software.

**Q: Which AI tools do these work with?**
A: Any tool that accepts custom instructions or system prompts: Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Cline, etc.

**Q: Do I get updates?**
A: With the Lifetime Access plan ($99), yes — all future updates and new skills forever. The One-Time Purchase ($29) is a snapshot of the current version.

**Q: Is there a subscription?**
A: No. Both options are one-time payments. No recurring charges.

**Q: Is there a refund policy?**
A: Yes. 30-day money-back guarantee on both plans.

**Q: How do I get the skills after purchase?**
A: Instant delivery via email after checkout.

**Q: Who made these?**
A: Jack McNicol — 20 years shipping production code.

## Checkout API

The checkout API accepts POST requests with `multipart/form-data`. It sends checkout details via email and does not process payment directly — payment instructions are emailed to the buyer.

### Required fields

- `productId` — `once` or `lifetime`
- `name` — buyer full name
- `email` — buyer email address

### Optional fields (for company receipt)

- `purchaseKind` — `personal` (default) or `company`
- `companyName` — required when `purchaseKind=company`
- `addressLine1` — required when `purchaseKind=company`
- `addressLine2` — optional
- `city` — required when `purchaseKind=company`
- `postalCode` — required when `purchaseKind=company`
- `country` — required when `purchaseKind=company`

### Example: personal purchase via curl

```bash
curl -X POST https://eliteskills.dev/api/checkout \
  -F "productId=lifetime" \
  -F "name=Jane Doe" \
  -F "email=jane@example.com"
```

### Example: company purchase with receipt via curl

```bash
curl -X POST https://eliteskills.dev/api/checkout \
  -F "productId=once" \
  -F "name=Jane Doe" \
  -F "email=jane@example.com" \
  -F "purchaseKind=company" \
  -F "companyName=Acme Corp" \
  -F "addressLine1=123 Main St" \
  -F "city=Melbourne" \
  -F "postalCode=3000" \
  -F "country=Australia"
```

### Response

Success returns `{"ok":true}`. Errors return `{"error":"..."}` with an appropriate HTTP status code (400, 429, or 500).

## Pages

- [Home](https://eliteskills.dev/): Landing page with skills overview, reviews, pricing, and purchase links
- [Contact](https://eliteskills.dev/contact): Contact form for support questions
